description: Clean coldchain analysis worker: R 4.2.2 + ggplot2/data.table/scales, Python 3.11 + numpy/pandas/matplotlib, gsutil, full git repo at /srv/coldchain/repo. No stale run data.
upload_command: gsutil cp images/coldchain-worker-20260317.tar.gz gs://coldchain-freight-sources/vm-images/ && gcloud compute images import coldchain-worker-20260317 --source-file=gs://coldchain-freight-sources/vm-images/coldchain-worker-20260317.tar.gz --os=debian-12
